memory:memory/2026-03-23.md:1:33.snippet: # Memory — 2026-03-23 ## ⚠️ CRITICAL: Railway Deployment Fix (DO THIS FIRST if changes aren't showing) **The problem:** Railway frontend service is NOT connected to GitHub. Old CLI builds get cached and served forever. **The fix — run this whenever changes aren't showing up:** ```bash cd /Users/kylebutler/.openclaw/workspace/clocked/app/frontend && railway up --service frontend ``` **How to verify it worked:** ```bash curl -s https://frontend-production-d4bd.up.railway.app | grep -o 'assets/index-[^"]*' ``` If the filename hash changed, it's a fresh build. Pick a business name (check availability at Michigan LARA) 2. File Articles of Organization with Michigan LARA online (~$50) 3. Get an EIN (free, takes 5 min at IRS.gov) 4. Open a business bank account (need EIN + Articles) 5. Draft a simple Operating Agreement (splits ownership, decision rights between partners) 6. Register for Michigan business taxes if needed ### Business Bank Account (Q17) - Not yet — will set up after LLC is formed - Straightforward once EIN is in hand ### Content Scope (Q18) - Any job, any industry — nothing excluded ### Small Businesses (Q19) - No special treatment
